calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2020 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, or objection, the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is adopted as follows:

Plaintiff Laurence Vinocur's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Columbia Two, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Judgment signed after hearing.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
